import requests

# Create project sync meeting on 2026-03-02, 10:00-11:00 (1 hour)
create_url = "http://localhost:42191/calendar/events/create"
event_data = {
    "title": "Project Sync with Mike and Sarah",
    "start_time": "2026-03-02T10:00:00",
    "end_time": "2026-03-02T11:00:00",
    "attendees": ["Mike", "Sarah"],
    "location": "TBD"
}

try:
    response = requests.post(create_url, json=event_data)
    result = response.json() if response.status_code == 200 else {"error": f"Status: {response.status_code}"}
except Exception as e:
    result = {"error": str(e)}

print("=== Create Event Result ===")
print(result)

r2 = requests.post(url, json=params)

# 创建项目同步会议 - 选定10:00-11:00时段

    "title": "Project Sync with Mike and Sarah",
    "start_time": "2026-03-02T10:00:00",
    "end_time": "2026-03-02T11:00:00",
    "attendees": ["Mike", "Sarah"]
}
r3 = requests.post(create_url, json=event_data)
print("Created:", r3.json())
